visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a medium shot of a man wearing a green t-shirt, glasses, and a patterned cap. He gestures with his hands while an image of an iPhone with 'iPhone 17' text is overlaid on the left. The background is a brightly lit indoor space with vertical blinds. (2) A quick cut shows a graphic of a fingerprint icon with yellow explosive lines, followed by a transition to a retail store setting. A close-up shows two Vivo smartphones (Vivo Y100 and V29) side by side on a display shelf. (3) The man appears in the retail store environment, standing in front of shelves filled with various smartphone boxes. He looks directly at the camera and speaks while pointing. (4) The scene returns to the initial indoor setting. The man holds up a smartphone case and an iPhone. He points specifically at a cutout on the side of the case meant for the camera control button. (5) An extreme close-up shot focuses on the side profile of a transparent phone case, highlighting a specific rectangular cutout. A red arrow points to this feature. (6) Back to the medium shot, the man continues to demonstrate the phone case's features, placing his finger in the cutout. Graphic icons of a camera and question marks appear around him to emphasize his points. (7) The man points to the camera button area on the phone he is holding. He maintains an energetic expression, gesturing toward the camera as he asks the audience a question.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: 3ctim. [Logo]: miko 米可手機館. [Slogan]: 手機破盤價，米可殺很大！. [Subtitle]: iPhone 17 全系列. (2) [Variety]: 指紋解鎖 要回來了?! (3) [Subtitle]: 推薦大家 買手機到米可. (4) [Variety]: 工廠流出 iPhone 17 全系列保護殼. (5) [Subtitle]: iPhone 17的手機殼開箱嗎. [Subtitle]: 我前幾天跟廠商在聊天的時候. (6) [Subtitle]: 發現到原來我們的手機殼. (7) [Subtitle]: 相機控制按鈕這邊開孔. (8) [Variety]: 原來是有玄機的. (9) [Subtitle]: 怎麼說. (10) [Subtitle]: 今年的iPhone 16 Pro. (11) [Subtitle]: 他們只要有相機控制按鈕. [Subtitle]: 其實是應該要把它填補起來對不對. (12) [Subtitle]: 這樣子你在使用相機控制按鈕會更好按. (13) [Subtitle]: 結果沒想到. (14) [Subtitle]: 這個廠商在前天跟我開會的時候. (15) [Subtitle]: 不約而同跟我講說. (16) [Subtitle]: 這個地方不能把它填起來. (17) [Subtitle]: 我就問他到底是什麽原因. (18) [Variety]: 為什麼不能填起來? (19) [Subtitle]: 他說有可能. (20) [Variety]: 指紋辨識 要放在這裡. (21) [Subtitle]: 所以指紋辨識要回來了嗎. (22) [Variety]: 你期待嗎? (23) [Subtitle]: 還是你覺得根本沒必要.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One main male creator appears throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man with short hair, wearing glasses, a green t-shirt with a 'Roots' logo, and a brown and beige flat cap.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary background is an indoor room with light-colored vertical blinds and soft ambient lighting. A secondary scene occurs inside a brightly lit mobile phone retail store with shelves stocked with smartphone packaging (Samsung, Vivo, etc.).

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with an energetic male voice speaking Mandarin at a fast pace. An upbeat, major-key electronic pop BGM with a strong, steady drum beat plays in the background. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect triggers as a transition occurs, followed by a 'pop' SFX coinciding with visual graphics appearing. The speaker's tone remains high-arousal and authoritative. (3) A 'ding' sound effect punctuates a specific point mentioned by the speaker. The BGM remains constant in tempo and texture. The voice shows high pitch variability to maintain audience engagement. (4) Another 'pop' sound effect is heard as new text overlays emerge. The speaker maintains a high speech rate with very few pauses. (5) As the speaker asks a question at the end, his intonation rises significantly. The BGM continues until the very last second of the recording, where it and the vocal track cut off abruptly.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Information Sharing -> Promotion -> Inquiry -> Engagement CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to share tech rumors regarding the iPhone 17 and iPhone 16 Pro's hardware features, specifically focusing on the camera button and the potential return of fingerprint recognition, while simultaneously promoting Miko Mobile for smartphone purchases.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The speaker explicitly tells the audience to buy phones at 'Miko' and displays the store's branding and logo throughout the video.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The high production value with dense text overlays and sound effects is typical of short-form social media content aimed at maintaining high viewer retention.
